common.tagline: An old habit for a new era

splash.tagline: An old habit for a new era
splash.savestmentDef: Save smart. Invest smarter. Grow rich — the way Bharat does.
splash.act2: In a clay Gullak, money just sits idle…

language.title: Choose Your Language
language.sub: Pick the one you think in

phone.title: Chaliye, shuru karte hain
phone.sub: Aapka mobile number — bas itna hi
phone.demoHint: Demo build — koi bhi number chalega · OTP: 123456
phone.hint: Hum sirf isse aapko apne savings dikhane ke liye use karenge.

name.title: Aapko kya bulayein?
name.sub: Chiraiya bhi aapse milne ke liye uttavli hai
name.label: Naam

salary.title: {name}, salary kis tareekh ko aati hai?
salary.sub: Iss hisaab se aapke liye sabse achi savings yojana banayenge

trust.title: {name}, aapka paisa 100% surakshit — aapke naam, aapke control mein
trust.footer: Aapka paisa aapke naam par invest hota hai
trust.1d: Your money is only invested through RBI-regulated partners.
trust.2d: Every rupee is registered in securities under your name.
trust.3d: Government bonds and gold bonds — the safest instruments available.
trust.3info: AAA-rated means the highest safety rating given by credit agencies like CRISIL. These bonds have near-zero risk of default.
trust.4t: Easy To Break, Easy To Withdraw
trust.4d: Withdraw anytime. Money in your bank within T+1 day.
trust.5d: What you see is what you pay. Full transparency.
trust.moneyInYourName: Your money stays in your name
trust.afterAction: Your money is now invested in your name

goals.title: Aapka sapna kya hai?
goals.sub: Ek goal chunein — hum baaki sambhal lenge
goals.amountSub: Aaj ka khwaab — kal ka muqaam
goals.timelineSub: Mahina aur saal chunein — hum hisaab kar denge
goals.timelineReadout: Aap {month} {year} tak ka time chunenge — {n} mahine
goals.amountSuggestion: Aapke goal ke hisaab se yeh amount suggest hai

autopilot.title: Bachat ka apna tareeka chunein

fixed.title: Roz Thoda
fixed.desc: Daily auto-save — set karo aur bhool jao. Salary-walon ke liye perfect.

inflow.title: Kamai ka Hissa (5% / 10%)
inflow.desc: Jab bhi paisa aaye — UPI, salary, bonus — uska ek hissa Gullak mein. Gig + daily-wage walon ka favourite.

roundup.title: Spare Change
roundup.desc: Har transaction se bachha hua paisa Gullak mein. Jaldi aa raha hai!

sweep.title: Salary Day Jaadu
sweep.desc: Salary aate hi khud-ba-khud bachat. Jaldi aa raha hai!

autopilot.hint: Mode aap kabhi bhi badal sakte hain

inflow.title: Har kamai ka kitna hissa?
inflow.sub: Jab bhi paisa aaye, uska {pct}% Gullak mein automatically
inflow.trust: Burst-mode bhi available — bonus aaye to ek tap mein lock

commit.title: Hisaab humne kar diya
commit.sub: Aapko bas ₹{daily}/din save karne hain — {months} mahine mein {goal} pakka
commit.creditBridge: Itni jaldi pohanchne ke liye, credit option bhi dekh sakte ho — savings ke saath.
commit.projDisclaimer: * Govt + AAA-rated only · 7-9% projected · Past returns indicative

mandate.title: UPI Mandate Setup
mandate.sub: This is your automatic saving plan
mandate.flowTitle: Aapne sirf permission di hai · Paisa hamesha aapke control mein
mandate.agree: I understand that ₹{amount} will be deducted daily from my bank automatically. I can stop anytime.
mandate.trust: Easy to break, easy to withdraw
mandate.failure: Permission couldn't complete. Please try again.

success.title: Mubarak ho, {name}!
success.sub: Aapne aaj ek nayi aadat shuru ki
success.trust: Aapka paisa aapke naam par invest hota hai

dash.trust: Your money is invested in your name
dash.totalJama: Total Saved — This is how much you've saved so far
dash.goalEta: At this pace, ~{n} months to go
dash.motivation: Even ₹{n}/day builds a big fund — you're on the right path
dash.nudge: Increase from ₹{a} to ₹{b} and reach your goal {n} months earlier
dash.tapToUnpack: Tap to see where it's invested

empty.title: Let's start your first Gullak
empty.sub: Roz thoda — kal bada. Pick a goal to begin.

burst.title: Bonus / Extra paisa aaya?
burst.sub: Ek tap mein lock karo — kal ka sapna aur paas
burst.modalSub: Yeh aapke abhi ke goal mein add hoga
burst.success: Mubarak ho! ₹{amount} Gullak mein lock ho gaye

slides.1t: ₹500 ka chai. ₹500 ka samosa. Aur ₹500 ka… kuch nahi?
slides.1b: Bank mein paisa rakha rehne ka matlab — chai mehngi hoti rahegi, paisa wahi ka wahi.
slides.2t: Roz thoda paisa, automatically — bina dikkat, bina yaad rakhe
slides.2b: Savestment matlab — paisa bank mein nahi, growth mein.
slides.2c: Bank-grade. Aapke naam. Aapke control mein.
slides.3t: Aapke paise bhi badhne lagte hain — har din
slides.3b: Govt bonds, gold, AAA-rated paper. Sab regulated. Sab safe.
slides.4t: Aap hi ke control mein — hamesha
slides.4b2: Paisa aapke bank mein 24 ghante mein
slides.4b4: Koi lock-in nahi — aapka paisa, aapke haath

loading.msg: Aapka Gullak ready ho raha hai…

walkthrough.step1Body: Watch how your money grows day by day. Tap any toggle to switch the view.
walkthrough.step2Body: This is what's saved + earned so far. Tap Chiraiya to see where your money is invested.
walkthrough.step3Body: Better than a savings account. Updated every day.
walkthrough.step4Body: Track how close you are to your dream.

risk.title: Risk
risk.body: Very low. Government and AAA-rated bonds — the safest instruments available.

returns.title: Returns
returns.body: Higher than savings accounts. Variable, never guaranteed. Past returns are not future promises.

time.title: Time
time.body: Your money is invested same-day. Earnings start accruing immediately.

tenure.title: Tenure
tenure.body: No fixed tenure. Your Gullak runs as long as you save into it.

liquidity.title: Liquidity
liquidity.body: Withdraw anytime. Money lands in your bank within T+1 day.

lockin.title: Lock-in
lockin.body: None. You can stop, pause, or withdraw whenever you want.

understanding.title: Understood?
understanding.body: If anything feels unclear, tap support. We'll explain in plain words.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.sub: As soon as saving starts, it'll show up here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacyNote: Your data is encrypted. We don't sell it. You can delete your account anytime.

rules.noneSub: Add your first saving rule from the home screen.

sim.runDailySaveSub: Triggers all your fixed-mode rules right now
sim.simulateSpendSub: Adds to your round-up bucket for today
sim.generateWeeklySub: Builds this week's summary right now

patterns.failureGeneric: Something didn't work. Please try again.

motivational.new: Chhota shuru kiya hai — bas consistency chahiye.
motivational.streak: Roz ₹{n} se bhi bada fund banta hai — sahi raaste par ho.
motivational.goal50: Aadhi manzil par ho — aage badhte raho!
motivational.nudge: Aaj thoda aur add karoge to kal ka goal aur paas aayega.
motivational.passive: Aapka paisa kaam kar raha hai — habit banaye rakho.
motivational.postWithdraw: Ek sapna poora hua. Ab agla Gullak banao!

credit.title: A special offer for you
credit.sub: Chiraiya brought you a key — based on your saving habit

productDesc.consumer-durable: Phone, fridge, washing machine — flexible EMIs
productDesc.emergency: When life surprises you — quick credit line

credit.savingFirst: Aapki bachat is offer ka base hai — savings hamesha priority.
credit.needs30Days: Save for 30 days to unlock credit options
credit.needsMandate: Activate your saving rule to unlock credit
credit.needsAA: Connect your bank (AA) for the best rates
credit.applySuccess: Approved! Disbursing to your bank within T+1.
credit.applyTrust: Loan is between you and the lender — Gullak is your distributor.
credit.noOffers: No offers yet — keep saving to unlock
credit.dashboardCta: Aapke liye ek key layi hai — up to ₹{max} loan

aa.title: Connect your bank
aa.explain1: We read your account info to suggest the right saving amount and pre-approve credit at better rates.
aa.explain2: We never see your password or move money without your permission.
aa.explain3: You can revoke access anytime in Settings.
aa.connected: Connected — your account snapshot is now used to personalise offers
aa.demoNote: Demo build — no real bank connection happens

withdraw.title: Break your Gullak
withdraw.preview: Bank mein T+1 din mein paisa pahunchega

_tier_options_for_swap: OPTION A (current default — heroic): Bachat Shuruati / Veer / Yodha / Munafa Sherni / Aatmanirbhar
OPTION B (Hindi-English mix): Naya Saver / Bachat Mitra / Bachat Veer / Munafa Master / Wealth Warrior
OPTION C (nature/growth): Beej / Ankur / Paudha / Vriksha / Vatavriksha
OPTION D (cosmic): Tara / Chand / Surya / Akashganga / Brahmand
OPTION E (playful): Chai Saver / Pakka Saver / Champ Saver / Pro Saver / Maharaja Saver
OPTION F (milestone-anchored): Roz Wala / 7-Day Star / 1-Mahina Mast / 3-Mahina Champ / Saal-Bhar Sherni
Edit tiers.tN.name + tiers.tN.celebrate below to swap. Other locales follow same structure.

beginner.name: Naya Bachatkar
beginner.celebrate: Chaliye, shuru karte hain — pehla rupee Gullak mein!

t1.name: Bachat Shuruati
t1.celebrate: 3 din ka pakka — aapki bachat ki aadat ban gayi! Aage badhte raho.

t2.name: Bachat Veer
t2.celebrate: Lagatar ek hafta — Bachat Veer ban gaye! Yaar, ye baat hai.

t3.name: Bachat Yodha
t3.celebrate: Ek mahina, koi naagha nahi — aap Bachat Yodha hain. Bharat ke serious savers mein aapka naam.

t4.name: Munafa Sherni
t4.celebrate: Teen mahine ka pakka — aap Munafa Sherni hain. Aapka paisa ab kaam kar raha hai.

t5.name: Aatmanirbhar
t5.celebrate: Ek poora saal — aap Aatmanirbhar hain. Bharat ke top 1% savers mein. Naaz hai aap par.

family.headline: Saath bachat — saath manzil
family.sub: Mil-jul ke jodne se sapna jaldi paas aata hai
family.soloSub: Mummy-papa ya life partner ko bhi shamil karein — mil-jul ke ye sapna pakka
family.howStep1: Code generate karein — sirf ek tap
family.howStep3: Wo join karein, mil ke bachat shuru — sapna pakka

join.inviteHeadline: Aapko Family Gullak mein bulaya hai!
join.inviteSub: Mil-jul ke ye sapna pakka — har rupee aapke naam, sab kuch transparent
join.loginNeededSub: Apna account banao — phir is family Gullak mein shamil ho jaayein
join.trustLine: Aapka paisa aapke naam · Sirf aap nikaal sakte ho
join.notFoundSub: Code expired ho gaya hoga, ya glat type hua. Bhejne wale se naya code maangein.

money.saveFailedBody: No problem. We'll try again tomorrow.
